raw_input:
[4.0/5] Help those poor abused hands This is a very nice hand care bundle for very hands on people. First you get a very nice hand cleaner that contains activated charcoal. This detoxes and cleans very nicely of the toughest dirt, eliminating strong odor but doesn't damage your hands like some strong cleaners might do.

Next you get a moisturizing and healing cream. This is great for those who have done some damage to their hands in some physical hand jobs where they hand up with dry and cracked hands. This gives back some moisture and heals those hands.

Last but not least is a nice protect and moisturizer. This adds a nice barrier to your hands but also adds much needed hydration to much abused hands that are dry, cracked and scaly. When you have this on your hands it is much easy to wash and wipe away stubborn dirt.

This is a nice little set that can also be gifted, especially for people who work with their hands like mechanics or wood workers but many others. This works really well and will help restore some of those much abused hands. [4.0/5] I wash my hands alot This is a perfect bundle for me. The barrier cream I have to apply several times a day, because I wash my hands all the time. I like the hand cleaner. Dirt and grime get cleaned off wonderfully and my hands get exfoliated. Then, I finish up with the salve. That helps relieve the cracks from dry skin. [4.0/5] Workman's Friend Ultimate Hand Care Bundle For me, I like the Hand Cleaner and Barrier Cream the most in this bundle. I found that the Superior Healing Hand Cream was just average. These products might seem dude oriented, but they work for anyone.

Superior Hand Cleaner with Activated Charcoal (individually 4/5 stars):
--Works great to remove grease and odors. I like the pumice in the cleanser, as it gives me a real clean, scrubby feeling.

Superior Barrier Skin Cream (individually 4/5 stars):
--Actually does help prevent grease or oil from staining my hands. Also helps keep my fingernails from becoming a dirt mess when I weed without gloves. But doesn’t provide much of a moisturizing effect.

Superior Healing Hand Cream (individually 3/5 stars):
--Truly unscented hand lotion. But it’s just average as a lotion -- it took a few days of 2-3x per day applications to help heal my cracked hands. [5.0/5] Great for working hands This is a great set if your hands regularly get dirty or dry. There's a barrier cream that can be used as a hand lotion, charcoal exfoliating hand soap, and a thick hand cream. There is a faint scent, but it's clean smelling if anything. The soap says you can use it with or without water. I wouldn't eat anything with my hands without using water with it though. The heavy cream is really nice to out on just before bed, just the tiniest amount will take care of your hands. Both creams soak in quickly and aren't greasy at all. I wash my hands it seems like a thousand times a day and these keep them from being tight and dry. [5.0/5] Awesome products This is a great, complete hand hair set for anyone with dry, cracked hands. It would make a good gift.

*The charcoal scrub is very gritty so it's good for getting dirt out of the cracks on your hands.
*The barrier cream is helpful for prevention of dry hands (stop it before it even starts).
*Both the barrier cream and the hand cream have the nice side effect of reducing the appearance of wrinkles/aging on your hands.
*The products are gentle and excellent quality.
*A little goes a long way. [4.0/5] Helps dirty hands We do a lot of house work, art, construction work, and gardening. We use a lot of soap. That orange goop with pumice in it is our normal heavy duty hand cleaner, this soap is equivalent to that soap without the orange scent. You definitely do need water for it to be effective even though the bottle claims you don't. The hand cream is a great heavy duty healing lotion, similar to eucerin. I haven't noticed an appreciable difference in the ease of cleanymy hands after using the barrier cream however. [5.0/5] Love it This is great STUFF [5.0/5] Fantastic care for tough, cracked skin I work with my hands a lot and have fairly tough skin. Normal lotions and creams don't really work. This kit is the full package, starting with hand cleaner that works hard to get dirt out of every area of your hand and fingernails and works well when used with a brush. You also get the healing hand cream which was softer than I was expecting but it's really an amazing product that helps soften tough skin and provides a lot of moisture to help heal cracks.

The final product is the barrier skin cream. This is more of a protective cream you apply once you have your skin where you want it. It protects your skin and helps prevent cracking and dryness. All three of these products are fantastic and have been working so much better than I expected. I had heard of this brand before but never had a chance to try it until now and I'm a big fan. I think my favorite product is the healing hand cream. It's the most useful for me and really works fantastically to heal my dry skin, especially in the winter when it's especially dry where I live. The other products are also good but I'm positive once the healing hand cream is used up I'll be purchasing more. Great product, made in the USA and has a real quality look to both the packaging and product. I should also mention there isn't a lot of scent at all to these products, they just do their job and don't try to make you smell a certain way which I really like. [5.0/5] Love these products My hands are dry and cracked. These products haven’t made my hands feel softer and moisturized. I was extremely pleased they have a skin cream too. I use the cream on my elbows and other dry patches of skin. I have seen some improvement on my elbows where it isn’t as rough. [4.0/5] Ingredients These have very little odor. They include a lot of currently popular natural ingredients along with a few ingredients not favored by those most into that kind of thing.

Barrier

It isn't quite like a protective glove. Probably does help with protection for a limited time, not a whole day of work with your hands, during which it gets absorbed, wiped away, worked out by other substances and so on. Takes a couple minutes to soak in, but it's not very greasy once it does.

Active ingredient: dimethicone.
Inactive ingredients: deionized water, stearic acid, propylene glycol, glyceryl stearate, isopropyl palmitate, Ricinus communis (castor) seed oil, cyclopentasiloxane, phenoxyethanol, ethylhexyglycerin, sodium hydroxide, mineral oil, Simmondsia chinensis (jojoba) seed oil, xanthan gum, disodium EDTA, acrylates copolymer, Aloe barbadensis leaf extract.

Hand cleaner

Looks like it has plenty of charcoal, it's so dark, but more of the grit--and it's very gritty--is from pumice than charcoal. Does't foam, cleans surprisingly well anyway, moisturizes a little.

Ingredients: aloe leaf juice, pumice, glycerin, sunflower seed oil, sorbitol, carbon [that's the charcoal], grape seed oil, lanolin oil, vitamin E acetate, xanthan gum, carbomer, 2-phenoxyethanol, ethylhexylglycerin, sodium hydroxide.

Hand cream

Not a heavy-duty cream but has some nice stuff in it that's thought to help with skin health, moisturizes for a while.

Ingredients: water, glycerin, stearic acid, dimethicone, sunflower seed oil, cetearyl alcohol, ceteareth-20, allantoin, petrolatum, hydroxyethylcellulose, aloe vera, Symphytum officinale (comfrey) rhizome/root extract, Calendula officinalis oil, tocopherol, diazolidinyl urea, iodopropynyl butylcarbamate, acrylates/C10-30 alkyl acrylate crosspolymer, sodium hydroxide.

Workman's Friend is a brand about two years old based in Texas. The hand cream and soap are made in the US, the barrier is made in Canada. [5.0/5] Perfect for people that work with soap Excellent product my wife clean dishes and the soap put her hands itching, with this product itching is gone I would recommend to everyone
Mi esposa lava trastos y el jabón le da picazón extrema, pero con este producto la picazón se fue sus manos está muy hermosas

response:
Here is a summary of the product reviews:

This hand care bundle receives mostly positive reviews, averaging around 4 to 5 stars. The set includes three products: an activated charcoal hand cleaner, a healing hand cream, and a barrier skin cream. It is particularly popular among people who work with their hands, such as mechanics, woodworkers, gardeners, and those who wash their hands frequently.

The charcoal hand cleaner is praised for its ability to remove tough dirt, grease, and odors. It has a gritty, scrubby texture from pumice and charcoal that gives a thorough clean while also being somewhat moisturizing. It requires water to work effectively.

The barrier skin cream is highlighted as a standout product. It acts like a protective glove on the skin, helping to prevent grease and dirt from deeply staining hands and fingernails. It also provides some moisturizing benefits and may help reduce the appearance of aging on hands.

The healing hand cream is well regarded for softening tough, dry, and cracked skin, especially in winter. Some reviewers found it average compared to the other two products, but most agree it is effective with regular use. It is noted as unscented and gentle.

Overall, reviewers appreciate that the products are high quality, gentle, and that a little goes a long way. The bundle is recommended as a good gift, especially for people who work with their hands or struggle with dry and cracked skin.
